one_liner: Long Island cemetery franchise with ~$162M Form 990 net assets trades thinly on OTC; per-share economics blocked until share count and dividend cash are verified.
base_irr_note: Component economic value base ~$54/sh vs ~$575 quote on provisional 3.46M shares; Lawrence IRR pending verified denominator.
key_assumptions: FY2024 Form 990: ~$42.9M revenue, ~$5.3M net income, ~$161.9M net assets (ProPublica EIN 11-1190044)
Provisional share count ~3.46M conflicts with indicated $45.40 dividend vs $5.3M NI
Component sum base ~$53.8/sh: 990 NAV floor + operating franchise + land gap option less illiquidity reserve
OTC Pink illiquidity and 501(c)(13) governance constrain minority realization
